name: Utah (United States)
description: A navy blue field bearing the Great Seal of Utah in the center, encircled by a thin gold ring. The seal shows a beehive on a shield inscribed 'INDUSTRY', with sego lilies, a bald eagle and two American flags, the dates 1847 and 1896, and the word 'UTAH'.
history: Utah's seal-on-flag design was first authorized in 1911 and the seal was last revised in 2011. On 21 March 2023 the legislature adopted a new state flag — a bold geometric design centered on a gold beehive — which became the official flag on 9 March 2024, with the older seal-on-bedsheet design retained as the 'historic state flag'. This file represents the seal-on-bedsheet version.

features.role: the Great Seal of the State of Utah, encircled by a gold ring
features.symbolism: depicts the state emblem (a beehive symbolizing industry) bearing the word 'INDUSTRY', flanked by sego lilies (the state flower); above, a bald eagle with outstretched wings; the date '1847' commemorates the arrival of the first Latter-day Saint pioneers in the Salt Lake Valley, and '1896' marks Utah's admission to the Union; two American flags flank the central shield
